rationale: Hypothesizes that sharp spikes in index implied correlation mark indiscriminate panic selling and rebound accumulation zones.
expected_failure_mode: Implied correlation can rise during a coordinated bear-market transition, turning the buy signal into a value trap.
stop_conditions: no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
near-Gold candidate repeats known Gold contract failures
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Fails to capture the COVID-19 or 2018 market bottoms.
